title: Why the Star Left
storyPurpose: Learn Celestial Keeper history — why the Star left and returned.

panels.description: Memory vision (tinted): ancient Celestial Keepers evacuating Primes onto the Star as Hollow Ones blot the sky.

bubbles.text: Before the First Rift… the Hollow Ones learned only hunger.

panels.description: Memory: Star departing; Guardian Cities flashing farewell beacons; Forge Network incomplete below.

bubbles.text: We fled to preserve them. Your Forge kept the ground alive. We kept the sky.
bubbles.speaker: High Keeper Lyra

panels.description: Present: Spark the Glowpup-line Riftborn hatchling: soft luminous fur, cyan-gold rift markings, large expressive eyes, small crystal growths, glowing-tip emotional tail, steadier aura when bonded; cute but original — not a franchise mascot glows between Lyra and Mira — designed as reconnect key; Nova presses to Spark.

bubbles.text: This little one… was meant to reconnect both worlds.
bubbles.speaker: High Keeper Lyra

dialogue.text: We fled to preserve them. Your Forge kept the ground alive. We kept the sky.
dialogue.speaker: High Keeper Lyra

dialogue.text: This little one… was meant to reconnect both worlds.
dialogue.speaker: High Keeper Lyra

captions.text: Before the First Rift… the Hollow Ones learned only hunger.

grokPrompt: Original high-energy Western fantasy comic storytelling with dynamic panel composition, dramatic inked linework, richly painted colors, expressive character acting, and clear cinematic action. Original Riftwilds IP only. White crystal and emerald vegetation first; gold architecture, aurora lighting, cyan-gold Rift accents, blue cavern skies with visible stars, floating waterfalls. NO purple neon AI-fantasy default. NO Marvel/DC/Pokémon characters or logos. Riftwilds comic "The Shattered Star" Issue #10 Volume Two, STORY PAGE 13/25 — Why the Star Left. Story purpose: Learn Celestial Keeper history — why the Star left and returned. Layout: three-row. 3 panels with clear inked gutters. Panel 1 (p13a): Memory vision (tinted): ancient Celestial Keepers evacuating Primes onto the Star as Hollow Ones blot the sky. Panel 2 (p13b): Memory: Star departing; Guardian Cities flashing farewell beacons; Forge Network incomplete below. Panel 3 (p13c): Present: Spark the Glowpup-line Riftborn hatchling: soft luminous fur, cyan-gold rift markings, large expressive eyes, small crystal growths, glowing-tip emotional tail, steadier aura when bonded; cute but original — not a franchise mascot glows between Lyra and Mira — designed as reconnect key; Nova presses to Spark. Characters: mira-eggwarden, high-keeper-lyra, elyan-voss. Creatures: spark, nova. Spark design lock: Spark the Glowpup-line Riftborn hatchling: soft luminous fur, cyan-gold rift markings, large expressive eyes, small crystal growths, glowing-tip emotional tail, steadier aura when bonded; cute but original — not a franchise mascot. Nova design lock: Nova: newly hatched Prime Companion from Issue #9, sleek luminous body with star-seam fur, twin Resonance Key glow matching Spark, constellation freckles, curious protective eyes, adolescent Prime silhouette — original species. Keeper lock: Mira Eggwarden: young adult Hatchery mentor/Keeper, warm brown skin, dark hair in practical braid, travel-stained hatchery coat over Compact robes, Compact lantern charm on satchel, determined protective eyes. Lyra lock: High Keeper Lyra: tall elegant Celestial Keeper, long white hair, gold and white armor, blue crystal crown, elegant cloak with ancient companion markings, calm stern eyes, floating gold relics. Astra lock: Astra: massive celestial wolf Prime Companion, galaxy fur with constellation markings, golden antlers, blue crystalline wings, nebula tail, legendary support presence. Axiom lock: Axiom: small floating crystalline fox prototype, transparent body with glowing circuitry, holographic tail, soft cyan-gold light. Environment: Shattered Star celestial sanctuary. Time: day-aurora. Weather: rift aurora mist. Lighting: white crystal, gold architecture, aurora cyan-gold. Continuity: {"history": "star-left-for-primes", "sparkPurpose": "reconnect"} Leave empty balloon-safe and narration-safe negative space. NO readable text in artwork. NO Cal Reed.
negativePrompt: readable dialogue text, captions, logos, watermarks, page numbers, UI chrome, Marvel, DC, Pokémon, manga screentone trademarks, extra limbs, duplicate characters, purple neon fantasy default, photoreal modern clothing, Pikachu lookalike, Cal Reed, Voltkit
letteringInstructions: Standard speech + narration; tails off faces and Spark/Nova/Astra eyes; Lyra speech calm/stern.
artAlt: Why the Star Left — The Shattered Star page 13
transcript: NARRATION: Before the First Rift… the Hollow Ones learned only hunger.
SPEECH (High Keeper Lyra): We fled to preserve them. Your Forge kept the ground alive. We kept the sky.
SPEECH (High Keeper Lyra): This little one… was meant to reconnect both worlds.
